---
title: "Cluster profiler for GO and KEGG analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2023-07-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(treemapify)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r find-markers, warning=F, message=F}
set.seed(1234)
proj_name <- "FLCvNML"
```

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- readRDS('./fullDataset/rds/FLCvNML_harmonized-byID-obj.rds')
```

```{r}

```
